measurement_caveat: No OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY / SERPAPI_API_KEY present in scheduled-task environment. Only the WebSearch proxy (directional Google-organic signal, NOT true answer-engine citations) was available. cited_us is derived from presence of sayfeai.com or elevaiq.com in the organic result set.
sampling_note: 47-query seed file > 40; sampled 14 weighted to full coverage of priority buckets (compliance, assessment, partner) per v2 sampling rule, plus high-intent comparison, local, and one rotating industry query. Cadence matches prior 4 runs.

results.notes: Law-firm/consultancy SERP. SB 26-189/ADMT now surfacing alongside SB 24-205. No sayfeai.com. Target page /compliance/colorado-ai-act does not exist (PILLAR HANDOFF).
Official bill-number query. Dominated by AmLaw firms + leg.colorado.gov. Target /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 exists (patched 2026-05-22) but not ranking.
Digital Omnibus delay narrative present (matches our llms.txt). Target /compliance/eu-ai-act does not exist (PILLAR HANDOFF).
Every winner offers a one-click downloadable template. Target /compliance/ai-policy-template does not exist (PILLAR HANDOFF) — the pillar MUST ship with a frictionless download to compete.
Target /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 exists; not ranking on a 5-day-old domain.
trycomplianceiq.com NOT in top 10 today (was historically #1 per ledger) — SERP is fluid, an opening. Target /compliance-assessment does not exist (PILLAR HANDOFF, Engine 1 conversion core).
TrustLayer Risk Matrix still owns the '5-minute / no sign-up' promise. Target /compliance-assessment does not exist (PILLAR HANDOFF).
MSP-channel SERP. Sayfeai has zero MSP content and no MSP reseller program — winning this requires a real Engine-2 offering, NOT manufactured page copy. Stays a strategy proposal.
openai.com partner intake + peer partners (Think Technologies, Codestone) dominate. Target /openai-smb-partner exists (patched 2026-05-20); not ranking.
CLE-provider SERP. Sayfeai does not offer an accredited CLE webinar — manufacturing this would be fabrication. Stays an Engine-2 asset proposal.
Pricing facts in SERP match our $25/$20 + April 2 2026 cut. Target /blog/chatgpt-business-vs-plus exists; not ranking.
Local Houston AI-consultant SERP. /about and /openai-smb carry LocalBusiness schema; not ranking on new domain.

SERP centers on the ChatGPT-Business-vs-ChatGPT-for-Healthcare BAA distinction. PATCHED THIS RUN: surfaced that distinction as a visible FAQ + comparison table on /healthcare (was schema-only) and aligned JSON-LD @id/url to clean /healthcare.

competitor_frequency_note: No single domain reached the 3+-distinct-query auto-detection threshold this run. Closest at 2 each: consumerfinancemonitor.com, fisherphillips.com, digitalapplied.com (tracked), pathopt.com (tracked), naitive.cloud, intuitionlabs.ai, aibusinessweekly.net (tracked), chatgpt.com, leg.colorado.gov.
